# RealCy.app

> Comprehensive portal for relocating to Cyprus. Covers new-build real estate (260+ developments on an interactive map), long-form relocation guides, curated service directories, and interactive calculators. All content is researched specifically for expats, digital nomads, and investors relocating to Cyprus in 2025–2026.

RealCy.app is the most comprehensive English-language resource for Cyprus relocation. Content covers visas, taxes (including the non-dom regime), property buying, cost of living, healthcare, schools, transport, and lifestyle across all five districts: Limassol, Paphos, Larnaca, Nicosia, and Ayia Napa.

## Relocation Guides — Immigration & Visas

- [Cyprus Residency and Visa Options](https://realcy.app/guides/residency-and-visas/): Overview of all pathways — PR by Investment, Digital Nomad Visa, EU registration
- [Cyprus Digital Nomad Visa — Complete Guide](https://realcy.app/guides/digital-nomad-visa-guide/): Eligibility, income requirements (€3,500/mo net), application process, processing times
- [Permanent Residency After 5 Years](https://realcy.app/guides/permanent-residency-5year/): Qualifying criteria, application process, rights vs citizenship
- [Family Reunification in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/family-reunification-guide/): Bringing dependents, document requirements, income thresholds
- [Work Permits for Non-EU Nationals](https://realcy.app/guides/work-permits-non-eu/): Employer quotas, permit types, fast-track tech scheme
- [Cyprus Citizenship by Naturalization](https://realcy.app/guides/citizenship-naturalization/): 7-year residency route, language requirements, timeline
- [Company Formation for Visa Purposes](https://realcy.app/guides/company-formation-visa/): When a Cyprus company enables residency, substance requirements
- [Startup Visa — Innovative Company Permit](https://realcy.app/guides/startup-visa-ict/): Non-EU tech founders, evaluation criteria, income requirements

## Relocation Guides — Taxes & Finance

- [Taxes for Expats in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/taxes-for-expats/): Non-dom regime, 60-day rule, capital gains, crypto treatment
- [Cyprus Non-Dom Status — Full Explainer](https://realcy.app/guides/non-dom-status-guide/): SDC exemption on dividends and interest, 17-year clock, who qualifies
- [Cyprus IP Box Regime](https://realcy.app/guides/ip-box-regime/): 2.5% effective tax on qualifying IP income, nexus approach
- [VAT Registration in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/vat-registration-guide/): €15,600 threshold, OSS for e-commerce, filing deadlines
- [Cryptocurrency Tax in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/crypto-tax-cyprus/): Current treatment, capital gains exemption, reporting obligations
- [Opening a Bank Account in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/banking-in-cyprus/): Which banks accept non-residents, KYC requirements, timelines, neo-bank alternatives
- [Cyprus Company Types Comparison](https://realcy.app/guides/company-types-comparison/): Ltd vs Sole Trader vs Partnership — tax treatment, costs, liability
- [Opening a Corporate Bank Account](https://realcy.app/guides/corporate-bank-account-guide/): Foreign director applications, required documents, typical rejections

## Relocation Guides — Property

- [Cyprus Title Deed Guide](https://realcy.app/guides/title-deed-status-guide/): The legacy backlog problem, how to verify status, contract protections
- [Buying Off-Plan in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/off-plan-buying-guide/): Developer vetting, escrow requirements, completion guarantees
- [Buying a New Development in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/new-development-buying-guide/): Reservation, contract of sale, VAT rates, Land Registry, title deed timeline
- [Short-Term to Long-Term Rental Transition](https://realcy.app/guides/rental-transition-guide/): Lease terms, deposits, what landlords require from foreign tenants

## Relocation Guides — Practical First Steps

- [Moving to Cyprus: Your First Month Checklist](https://realcy.app/guides/arrival-checklist/): Week-by-week steps — SIM, Civil Registry, bank account, GeSY, utilities, driving licence
- [Cost of Living in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/cost-of-living/): Regional breakdown — rent, utilities, food, schooling, healthcare, transport by city
- [Setting Up Utilities in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/utilities-setup-guide/): EAC electricity, water, broadband (Cablenet, Epic, Primetel, Cyta), setup process

## Relocation Guides — Business

- [Hiring Employees in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/hiring-in-cyprus/): Employment law, minimum wage (€1,000/mo), mandatory benefits, probation, termination
- [Trade License Requirements in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/trade-licenses-cyprus/): Which activities need a license, Municipal Authority process
- [Registering IP in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/ip-registration-cyprus/): Trademarks via Cyprus registry and EUIPO, software copyright, patents

## Relocation Guides — Family & Children

- [International vs Public Schools in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/international-vs-public-school/): Honest comparison — cost, curriculum, language, university recognition
- [Universities in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/universities-in-cyprus/): Public and private universities, fees, EU recognition, English-medium programs
- [Child Registration in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/child-registration-guide/): ARC for minors, school enrollment, children's healthcare card
- [Special Educational Needs in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/sen-guide/): SEN support in schools, EDEK, English-speaking therapists
- [Maternity and Paternity Rights in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/maternity-paternity-rights/): Leave entitlements, social insurance benefit, parental leave
- [Best Family-Friendly Neighborhoods in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/family-neighborhoods-guide/): District-by-district guide — safety, schools, green space, community

## Relocation Guides — Healthcare

- [How to Register with GeSY](https://realcy.app/guides/gesy-registration-guide/): Step-by-step registration for Cyprus public healthcare, choosing a GP
- [Dental Care in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/dental-care-guide/): Costs vs UK/Germany, GeSY coverage, finding English-speaking dentists
- [Pharmacies and Prescription Medication](https://realcy.app/guides/pharmacies-medication/): GeSY prescriptions, transferring foreign prescriptions, OTC availability
- [Emergency Services in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/emergency-services-guide/): 112, A&E hospitals by district, what to bring, private vs public

## Relocation Guides — Transport

- [Converting Your Driving Licence in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/driving-licence-conversion/): EU licences valid indefinitely; non-EU exchange process, reciprocal agreements
- [Importing and Registering a Car in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/car-import-registration/): Customs duty, KTEO roadworthiness test, registration tax
- [Getting from Cyprus Airports](https://realcy.app/guides/airport-transfers-guide/): Larnaca and Paphos taxi rates, bus options, Bolt availability
- [Road Safety and Driving Culture in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/road-safety-driving/): Left-hand traffic, speed limits, accident procedure, insurance

## Relocation Guides — Lifestyle

- [Moving to Cyprus with Pets](https://realcy.app/guides/moving-to-cyprus-with-pets/): EU passport, post-Brexit UK (21-day rule), non-EU countries including Israel — backwards-planning timelines
- [Learning Greek in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/language-learning-cyprus/): Cypriot dialect vs Standard Greek, apps, language schools, how much you need
- [Cyprus Cultural Etiquette](https://realcy.app/guides/cultural-etiquette-guide/): Hospitality norms, religious observance, business culture, tipping
- [Hiking in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/hiking-trails-guide/): Troodos, Akamas, coastal trails — difficulty ratings, best months
- [Cyprus Beach Guide by District](https://realcy.app/guides/beach-guide-by-district/): Best beaches per district — Blue Flag status, facilities, seasonal crowds
- [Cypriot Cuisine Guide](https://realcy.app/guides/cypriot-cuisine-guide/): Meze culture, key dishes, food traditions
- [Coffee Culture in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/coffee-culture-guide/): Cypriot coffee, kafeneions, specialty coffee scene, freddo culture

## Relocation Guides — Environment

- [Solar Panels in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/solar-energy-guide/): Net metering scheme, ROI, installation costs, government incentives
- [Water Quality and Scarcity in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/water-quality-scarcity/): Tap water safety, desalination, filtration options
- [Earthquake Preparedness in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/earthquake-preparedness/): Risk level, building codes, what to do
- [Wildfire Risk in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/guides/wildfire-risk-guide/): High-risk areas, alert system, home preparation
- [Cyprus Climate Guide — Month by Month](https://realcy.app/guides/climate-zones-seasonal/): Weather, UV, sea temperature, lifestyle by season

## Interactive Tools

- [Rent vs Buy Calculator](https://realcy.app/tools/rent-vs-buy-calculator/): Compare total cost of renting vs buying in Cyprus over 1–10 years
- [Neighbourhood Comparison Tool](https://realcy.app/tools/neighborhood-comparison/): Side-by-side comparison of all 5 Cyprus cities across 10 metrics
- [MEU1 Registration Tracker](https://realcy.app/tools/meu1-tracker/): Interactive checklist for EU citizens registering residence in Cyprus
- [Visa Pathway Finder](https://realcy.app/tools/visa-pathway-finder/): Answer 2 questions to find your recommended Cyprus visa route
- [60-Day Tax Residency Planner](https://realcy.app/tools/tax-residency-planner/): Check whether you qualify for Cyprus tax residency
- [Social Insurance Calculator](https://realcy.app/tools/social-insurance-calculator/): Calculate contributions for employed and self-employed
- [Banking Fee Comparison](https://realcy.app/tools/banking-fee-comparison/): Compare Bank of Cyprus, Hellenic, AstroBank, Revolut, Wise
- [Cyprus Tax Filing Calendar](https://realcy.app/tools/tax-filing-calendar/): All key annual deadlines colour-coded by urgency
- [Double Tax Treaty Finder](https://realcy.app/tools/double-tax-treaty-finder/): Cyprus tax treaties with 65+ countries — withholding rates
- [Freelancer vs Company Calculator](https://realcy.app/tools/freelancer-vs-company/): Sole trader vs Cyprus Ltd — take-home pay comparison
- [Health Insurance Comparison](https://realcy.app/tools/health-insurance-comparison/): Compare AXA, Bupa, Cigna, Allianz for Cyprus residents
- [Flight Connectivity Tracker](https://realcy.app/tools/flight-connectivity/): Direct routes from Larnaca (LCA) and Paphos (PFO) airports
- [Annual Events & Festivals Calendar](https://realcy.app/tools/events-calendar/): 30+ Cyprus events in a 12-month filterable calendar
- [ISP & Mobile Comparison](https://realcy.app/tools/isp-comparison/): Compare Cyta, Epic, Primetel, Cablenet broadband and mobile plans
- [Visa Renewal Reminder](https://realcy.app/tools/visa-renewal-reminder/): Track ARC, passport, visa, driving licence expiry dates
- [Cyprus Grants Finder](https://realcy.app/tools/grants-finder/): Available grants and subsidies for Cyprus businesses

## Curated Directories

- [Property Lawyers in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/sections/property-lawyers/): Vetted conveyancing solicitors for foreign buyers
- [Immigration Lawyers in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/sections/immigration-lawyers/): Specialists in digital nomad visas, PR by investment, work permits
- [Accountants & Tax Advisors](https://realcy.app/sections/accountants/): ICPAC-registered accountants for expat non-dom filings
- [Coworking Spaces in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/sections/coworking/): Prices, WiFi speeds, and amenities for 20+ venues
- [Specialist Doctors in Cyprus](https://realcy.app/sections/specialist-doctors/): English-speaking consultants with GeSY status and private pricing
- [Mental Health Services](https://realcy.app/sections/mental-health-services/): English-speaking therapists and psychologists
- [Expat Community Groups](https://realcy.app/sections/expat-communities/): Facebook groups, WhatsApp communities, Meetups by city and nationality
- [International Grocery Stores](https://realcy.app/sections/international-grocery/): Asian, Middle Eastern, Eastern European food stores by city
- [Fitness & Wellness Studios](https://realcy.app/sections/fitness-wellness/): Gyms, yoga, CrossFit, Pilates with pricing
- [Long-Term Rentals](https://realcy.app/sections/long-term-rentals/): Rental listings across all five cities
- [All 28 Directories](https://realcy.app/sections/): Full index of curated Cyprus directories

## Regional Guides

- [Limassol](https://realcy.app/regions/limassol/): Business capital, highest expat density, luxury high-rises, 126 new developments
- [Paphos](https://realcy.app/regions/paphos/): Retirees and families, UNESCO harbour, affordable, 50 new developments
- [Larnaca](https://realcy.app/regions/larnaca/): Airport hub, mid-range pricing, underrated expat scene, 40 new developments
- [Nicosia](https://realcy.app/regions/nicosia/): Inland capital, business district, non-touristy, academic community
- [Ayia Napa](https://realcy.app/regions/ayia-napa/): Southeast coast, beach resort lifestyle, 11 new developments

## New Developments Map

- [Interactive Map](https://realcy.app/): Browse 260+ new-build apartments and villas across Cyprus on an illustrated map. Filter by region.
- [Full Sitemap](https://realcy.app/sitemap.xml): All pages including 260+ individual development listings
